user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty and traditional American breakfast featuring scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, and golden hash browns.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk three eggs with a splash of milk and scramble in butter until fluffy. Serve alongside three strips of crispy oven-baked bacon and a side of shredded potato hash browns seasoned with salt and pepper. Accompany with a slice of buttered whole-wheat toast.
fields.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; whole-wheat toast adds fiber; potatoes offer potassium. This is a high-protein, energy-dense start to the day.

result.reasoning: The user requested a classic American breakfast for the 'Greek food filled day' (Day 7). Position -1 appends this new option to the existing breakfast list for Father on Day 7, alongside the Banana Bread Toast and Fruit & Nut Plate.
